title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: SILVER FALLS FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreational opportunities including an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. Provides preschool and afterschool child care programs. 601 Miller Street Silverton, OR 97381 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office Hours Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Pool Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-1pm and 3:30pm-7:30pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-4pm Pickball Monday/ Friday/ Sunday 8:30am-12:30, Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm, Saturday 4pm-7pm Email (503) 873-6456 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 873-6456 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 6am-1pm and 3:30pm-7:30pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From S Water Street, follow signs to Silver Falls State Park. Located in the Silverton Community Center, across the street from the Chamber of Commerce and library. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SILVER FALLS FAMILY YMCA
